element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Hold fire button for continuous stream
Charge up to three times for treble shot when power meters fill
Counter enemy fire by shooting their projectiles; some attacks require energy bolts specifically

element_introduction_order.element: Weak point targeting on enemy STs
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each enemy ST has destructible weak points that must be shot to deal damage
Array of special items available during combat
Alternative attack option alongside rapid fire and energy bolts
Each chief ST has different strategies requiring adaptive play
Final boss encounter; returning from prequel Battle Clash
Invading force with distinct combat patterns
Alternative to ST Falcon; stores up to ten energy beams, fires individually, less defense

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: One-on-one duel format creates alternating aggression/defensive cycles; intensity escalates from chiefs through Anubis to alien invaders

difficulty_curve.early_game: Training mode provides seven-lesson tutorial with instructor Rola; Battle mode opens with manageable chief encounters
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Chief ST battles introduce varied strategies and complex defensive patterns; projectile deflection demands increase
difficulty_curve.late_game: Emperor Anubis return encounter; Eltorian alien race invasion forces peak difficulty; reviewers noted difficulty in tracking incoming fire
notable_spikes: Transition from chiefs to Anubis boss fight
Introduction of Eltorian alien ST patterns
Multiple rapid projectile volleys from late-game enemies

notable_level_patterns.description: Each encounter isolates player in direct combat with single enemy mech; forces focus on weak point identification and defense strategy rather than navigation
Moves from single chiefs with basic patterns → Anubis with proven combat knowledge → Eltorian invaders with alien tactics; each tier demands new strategic approaches
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Anubis fight (narrative return); final Eltorian encounters

notable_level_patterns.description: Seven-lesson Training mode introduces mechanics sequentially before Battle mode requires mastery; reduces learning friction at campaign start
